summary: Final Launch Verification for Konekt branding completed. All branding elements are properly deployed across all pages. Fixed missing logo in PublicNavbarV2 component.
critical_code_review_comments: PublicNavbarV2.jsx was missing the logo image - fixed by adding img tag with /branding/konekt-logo-full.png
All other components (LoginPageV2, CustomerPortalLayoutV2, AdminLayout, Navbar) already had correct logo implementation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Konekt branding verification complete. All logo files are at /public/branding/konekt-logo-full.png and /public/branding/konekt-icon.png. Favicon, page title, and all sidebar/navbar logos are working correctly.

Branding Verification.Favicon loads at /branding/konekt-icon.p: PASS - Returns 200, correctly set in index.html
Branding Verification.Login page displays Konekt logo in hero: PASS - Logo visible in left panel
Branding Verification.Landing page navbar displays Konekt logo: PASS - Fixed PublicNavbarV2.jsx to show logo image
Branding Verification.Admin panel sidebar displays Konekt logo: PASS - Logo visible in sidebar with invert filter
Branding Verification.Browser tab title shows 'Konekt': PASS - Title is 'Konekt | B2B Commerce Platform'
